name: Bone-Chilling Embrace
descriptionTemplate: Recover [Arg1] Arithmetica and gain [Block:Arg2] Delayed Shield. If your Tentacle Stance is {Surging Tides}, instead summon [Arg3] Tentacles.
lore:
Flesh dissolves into the sea, bones harden into coral. Her gaze burns; she embraces you and sculpts you.

She promises to take you home.
